result: Data cleaning completed successfully. The R script loaded 7 tab-delimited survey datasets from data/input/, merged them by NSID using full_join, applied missing value code harmonization (converting wave-specific codes like -94, -999, -100, -97, -99 to standard codes -9, -8, -3, -2), created age-specific variables following naming conventions (regub15, regub16 for urban/rural; regov15, regov16, regov26, regov32 for government office regions; regnat32 for nation of residence), derived a UK/abroad indicator (reguk32), converted variables to labeled factors, and output the cleaned data to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 observations and 9 variables (NSID plus 8 derived variables).
